title_chinese: 唐梵飜對字音般若波羅蜜多心經
title_pinyin: Táng fàn fān duì zì yīn bōrě bōluómìduō xīnjīng
title_english: Heart Sutra with Tang-Sanskrit Transliteration and Character-by-Character Pronunciation
notes: This unique text presents the Heart Sutra in two parallel formats: (1) a Chinese translation and (2) the Sanskrit text transliterated using Chinese characters to represent Sanskrit sounds. This provides invaluable evidence for Tang-era Sanskrit pronunciation and the relationship between the Chinese and Sanskrit versions. The transliteration follows the Sanskrit text closely, confirming that by this period a Sanskrit version existed and was studied in China.

format_description.structure: The text alternates between Chinese translation (譯) and Sanskrit transliteration (梵/唐音). The Sanskrit is given in Chinese character transliteration representing the Sanskrit phonemes.
significance: Provides evidence for Tang-era pronunciation of Sanskrit
Shows character-by-character correspondence between Sanskrit and Chinese
Confirms existence of Sanskrit text tradition in Tang China
Useful for understanding how Sanskrit was taught and transmitted

sanskrit_transliteration.description: The following represents the Sanskrit text as transliterated in Chinese characters. This is the earliest Chinese record of the complete Sanskrit Heart Sutra pronunciation.

sections.transliteration_chinese: 鉢囉枳孃波囉弭多紇哩娜野
sections.transliteration_pinyin: bō là zhī niáng bō là mí duō hé lǐ nà yě

sections.transliteration_chinese: 阿哩也嚩嚕枳帝濕嚩囉冒地薩怛嚩 儗𭊶鉢囉枳孃波囉弭多左哩演 左囉麼努 尾喻嚕迦野底莎麼 本左塞建陀 担 左 莎婆嚩戌你演 鉢失野底莎麼
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: ārya-avalokiteśvaro bodhisattvo gambhīrāṃ prajñāpāramitā-caryāṃ caramāṇo vyavalokayati sma pañca-skandhāṃs tāṃś ca svabhāva-śūnyān paśyati sma
sections.notes: Note pañca-skandhāṃs in accusative, supporting Attwood's (2015) correction

sections.transliteration_chinese: 伊賀 舍哩子 嚧畔 戌你也 戌你也帝嚩 嚧畔 嚧鉢拏 鉢哩他 戌你也 戌你也也 鉢哩他 嚧畔 曳嚩銘嚩 吠娜那 僧枳孃 僧塞迦囉 尾枳孃喃
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: iha śāriputra rūpaṃ śūnyatā śūnyataiva rūpaṃ rūpān na pṛthak śūnyatā śūnyatāyā na pṛthag rūpaṃ evam eva vedanā saṃjñā saṃskāra vijñānaṃ
sections.notes: Note absence of 'yad rūpaṃ sā śūnyatā' line that Nattier identified as interpolation

sections.transliteration_chinese: 伊賀 舍哩子 薩嚩達磨 戌你也 落乞叉拏 阿弩鉢𨚗 阿你嚕駄 阿麼羅 阿尾麼羅 阿弩那 阿鉢哩布囉拏
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: iha śāriputra sarva-dharmāḥ śūnyatā-lakṣaṇā anutpannā aniruddhā amalā avimalā anūnā aparipūrṇāḥ

sections.transliteration_chinese: 怛莎麼 舍哩子 戌你也也 喃 嚧畔 曩 吠娜曩 曩 僧枳孃 曩 僧塞迦囉 曩 尾枳孃喃 曩 作乞秫 戌嚕怛囉 伽囉拏 爾賀嚩 迦也 麼曩悉 曩 嚧畔 攝鉢娜 健陀 囉娑 鉢囉瑟姹尾也 達磨 曩 作乞秫 馱睹 也嚩 曩 麼弩尾枳孃曩 馱都 曩 阿尾你也 曩 阿尾你也 乞灑喻 也嚩 曩 惹囉 麼囉拏 曩 惹囉 麼囉拏 乞灑喻 曩 努訶 娑母娜野 你嚕陀 麼哩伽 曩 枳孃喃 曩 鉢囉底 曩 阿鉢囉底
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: tasmāc chāriputra śūnyatāyāṃ na rūpaṃ na vedanā na saṃjñā na saṃskārā na vijñānaṃ na cakṣuḥ-śrotra-ghrāṇa-jihvā-kāya-manāṃsi na rūpa-śabda-gandha-rasa-spraṣṭavya-dharmāḥ na cakṣur-dhātur yāvan na manovijñāna-dhātuḥ nāvidyā nāvidyā-kṣayo yāvan na jarā-maraṇaṃ na jarā-maraṇa-kṣayo na duḥkha-samudaya-nirodha-mārgā na jñānaṃ na prāptir nāprāptiḥ
sections.notes: Includes na-aprāptiḥ, indicating this text follows the received Sanskrit tradition

sections.transliteration_chinese: 怛莎麼 舍哩子 阿鉢囉底怛嚩 冒地薩怛嚩喃 鉢囉枳孃波囉弭多 阿濕哩底也 尾賀囉底 阿止多嚩囉拏 止多嚩囉拏 曩悉底怛嚩 阿怛囉娑多 尾鉢哩也娑 阿底訖囉多 你瑟吒 你嚩拏
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: tasmāc chāriputra aprāptitvād bodhisattvānāṃ prajñāpāramitām āśritya viharati acittāvaraṇaḥ cittāvaraṇa-nāstitvād atrastro viparyāsa-atikrānto niṣṭhā-nirvāṇaḥ

sections.transliteration_chinese: 底哩也馱嚩 尾也嚩悉底多 薩嚩沒馱 鉢囉枳孃波囉弭多 阿濕哩底也 阿弩多囉 三藐三沒地 阿尾三沒馱
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: tryadhva-vyavasthitāḥ sarva-buddhāḥ prajñāpāramitām āśritya anuttarāṃ samyak-saṃbodhim abhisaṃbuddhāḥ

sections.transliteration_chinese: 怛莎麼 枳孃多尾演 鉢囉枳孃波囉弭多 麼賀曼怛囉 麼賀尾你也 曼怛囉 阿弩多囉 曼怛囉 阿娑麼娑麼 曼怛囉 薩嚩努訶 鉢囉舍麼曩 薩底演 阿弭底也怛嚩
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: tasmāj jñātavyam prajñāpāramitā mahā-mantro mahā-vidyā-mantro 'nuttara-mantro 'samasama-mantraḥ sarva-duḥkha-praśamanaḥ satyam amithyatvāt

sections.transliteration_chinese: 鉢囉枳孃波囉弭多也 塢訖多 曼怛囉 怛你也他 誐帝 誐帝 波囉誐帝 波囉僧誐帝 冒地 莎賀
sections.reconstructed_sanskrit: prajñāpāramitāyām ukto mantraḥ tadyathā gate gate pāragate pārasaṃgate bodhi svāhā
sections.notes: Note absence of oṃ before gate gate, supporting Attwood's observation that oṃ is a late interpolation

chinese_translation.description: The Chinese translation portion of T256
chinese_translation.text: 般若波羅蜜多心經。觀自在菩薩，行深般若波羅蜜多時，照見五蘊皆空，度一切苦厄。舍利子，色不異空，空不異色，色即是空，空即是色，受想行識亦復如是。舍利子，是諸法空相，不生不滅，不垢不淨，不增不減。是故空中，無色，無受想行識，無眼耳鼻舌身意，無色聲香味觸法，無眼界，乃至無意識界，無無明，亦無無明盡，乃至無老死，亦無老死盡，無苦集滅道，無智亦無得。以無所得故，菩提薩埵依般若波羅蜜多故，心無罣礙，無罣礙故，無有恐怖，遠離顛倒夢想，究竟涅槃。三世諸佛，依般若波羅蜜多故，得阿耨多羅三藐三菩提。故知般若波羅蜜多，是大神咒，是大明咒，是無上咒，是無等等咒，能除一切苦，真實不虛。故說般若波羅蜜多咒，即說咒曰：誐帝誐帝，波羅誐帝，波羅僧誐帝，菩提莎訶。
variants_from_T251: Mantra uses 誐帝 (gēdì) instead of T251's 揭帝 (jiēdì) - different character for 'gate'
Ends with 莎訶 (suōhē) without 僧 before it, unlike T251's 僧莎訶

phonological_analysis.description: The transliteration provides evidence for Middle Chinese pronunciation of Sanskrit

examples.note: Shows palatalization of jñ rendered as zh-n sequence
ś rendered as x (Middle Chinese palatal fricative)

for_sanskrit_text: Confirms Sanskrit text existed and was studied in Tang China
Absence of oṃ in mantra supports its identification as late interpolation
Absence of 'yad rūpaṃ sā śūnyatā' line in some sections
for_chinese_text: Shows how Chinese Buddhists understood the relationship between Sanskrit and Chinese
Provides pronunciation guide for Sanskrit study
Demonstrates sophisticated understanding of Sanskrit phonology
for_historical_linguistics: Evidence for Tang-era Sanskrit pronunciation traditions
Shows transcription conventions used in Buddhist translation

Attwood, Jayarava (2024). 'Revised Editions of the Prajñāpāramitāhṛdaya and Bānrěbōluómìduō xīn jīng.' Asian Literature and Translation 11(1): 1-42.
Matsumoto, Bunzaburō (1932). 'Die Prajñāpāramitā-hṛdaya-sūtra.' Zeitschrift für Indologie und Iranistik 8: 1-76.
Chen, Frederick (2004). 'The Heart Sutra: A Study of the Earliest Chinese Transliterations.' Unpublished.
